top_signals.title: Galaxy Digital Seeks $3.5 Billion Debt for Texas Data Center
top_signals.summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is planning to raise about $3.5 billion from a debut junk-bond sale to fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., extending AI borrowing’s push into the riskier corners of the US credit market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
